seoTitle: Riverside Unified Calendar 2028-2029: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Riverside Unified 2028-2029 calendar with Aug 14 classes begin, May 31 final grade-level end date, Thanksgiving, Winter Recess, Spring Recess, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Riverside Unified classes begin on August 14, 2028. The calendar lists May 30, 2029 as the end of high school and 7th grade, and May 31, 2029 as the end of elementary and 8th grade and the last day for teachers.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Riverside Unified start school in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Classes begin on Monday, August 14, 2028. The first day for 7th grade is Friday, August 11, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Riverside Unified Spring Recess in 2029?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess runs Monday, March 26 through Friday, March 30, 2029.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Riverside Unified in 2029?
calendarFaqs.a: High school and 7th grade end May 30, 2029. Elementary and 8th grade end May 31, 2029.

yearNumbers.label: Classes Begin
yearNumbers.detail: The general classes-begin date is August 14, 2028.

yearNumbers.label: Final Grade End Date
yearNumbers.detail: Elementary and 8th grade end May 31, after high school and 7th grade end May 30.
